---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Research & Publications
:::

::: profile-links-row
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/your-orcid-id){.profile-link}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID){.profile-link}
[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Your-Name){.profile-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current research focus

Write a paragraph describing your current research focus. What questions are you trying to answer? What methods do you use? What population or context does your work apply to?

::: phd-status-strip
::: phd-status-item
[Ethics]{.status-label} [Pending]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Data access]{.status-label} [Pending]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 1]{.status-label} [Planning]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 2]{.status-label} [Planning]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 3]{.status-label} [Planning]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Estimated completion]{.status-label} [20XX]{.status-value .status-goal}
:::
:::

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label} \### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label} \### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label} \### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Supervisory team

::: supervisor-row
[Supervisor Name](https://orcid.org/their-orcid){.supervisor-link} [Co-supervisor Name](https://orcid.org/their-orcid){.supervisor-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Publications

[20XX]{.pub-year}

::: pub-entry
[Title of your paper](https://doi.org/your-doi){.pub-title}\
[Journal Name]{.pub-journal}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Peer review

*Optional: list journals you review for.*
